about.title: About MIS
about.subtitle: Discover the visionaries and the mission behind Bangladesh's national health data digitisation.
about.mission_text: To digitise Bangladesh's healthcare landscape by implementing robust, real-time management information systems that empower policy makers with actionable data.
about.vision_text: A transformation into a data-driven health ecosystem where every citizen's health information is secure, accessible, and utilized for better health outcomes.
about.team_subtitle: Meet the dedicated professionals leading the digital health revolution at DGHS MIS.
